overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a sunlit, dystopian urban street in Night City. The environment features futuristic architecture with glass and metal structures, abandoned vehicles, sparse desert vegetation, and a few NPCs near a truck in an open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between futuristic buildings with abandoned construction equipment

events.description: begins walking forward past the orange construction vehicle
emerging from the narrow passage into a wider street area with more sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to an orange construction vehicle, moving toward an open intersection

entered.detail: large orange futuristic construction vehicle with warning stripes parked on the sidewalk
low concrete wall with white graffiti text separating the sidewalk from the vehicle
tall futuristic building with glass facade and metal scaffolding on the left side
large white semi-trailer truck parked in the distance at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view walking alongside an orange construction vehicle in a narrow urban corridor. The camera moves forward past concrete barriers with graffiti, between tall modern buildings, gradually emerging into a more open area where a large abandoned truck is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with abandoned truck and distant palm trees

events.description: large abandoned truck comes into clearer view ahead on the left side of the road
two NPCs become visible near the truck ahead, one crouching and one standing

agents.ego_description: walking toward an open intersection, approaching a large abandoned truck with two people nearby

notable_agents.action: crouching near the truck's rear wheels, appears to be examining or repairing something
standing guard with arms crossed, watching the surroundings near the truck

entered.detail: large curved building with pink holographic signage and weathered facade on the right
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide sunlit intersection as the camera approaches a large abandoned semi-truck. Two NPCs are visible near the truck - one crouching by the wheels and another standing guard. A distinctive curved building with pink holographic displays rises on the right, and palm trees become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with abandoned vehicles and futuristic buildings

events.description: passes the two NPCs and continues down the street
abandoned yellow car becomes visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking past the two NPCs near the truck and continuing down the sunlit street toward distant smoke

entered.detail: derelict yellow sedan parked on the right side of the street
bright yellow construction barricades blocking off the left side of the street
dark smoke rising in the distance indicating fire or destruction

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the two NPCs and continues down the open street, leaving the large truck behind. The curved pink building remains prominent on the right while palm trees line the left. The camera approaches yellow construction barricades and passes an abandoned yellow car, with smoke visible rising in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, industrial urban corridor into a wide, sunlit dystopian intersection. It begins by walking alongside an orange construction vehicle and graffiti-covered concrete barriers, moving between towering modern buildings before emerging into a more open space. As the camera approaches a large abandoned semi-truck, the environment expands to reveal two NPCs and a distinctive curved building adorned with pink holographic displays. The scene then shifts further down the open street, passing the figures and the truck as palm trees appear on the left. Finally, the camera moves past yellow construction barricades and an abandoned yellow car, with plumes of smoke rising in the distant background.
